title: parietaria hespera var. californica
intro: Parietaria hespera var. californica, also known as California Pellitory, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States. It is a member of the Urticaceae family, which includes stinging nettles, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Parietaria hespera var. californica has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma.
